'''''Intrepid''''' was a<ref name="GG6" /> [[Munifex-class light cruiser|''Munifex''-class light cruiser]]<ref name="egwr" /> of the [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Navy]]. During the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], it patrolled the [[Gesaril system/Legends|Gesaril system]] under the command of [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Dulrain]] in search of [[Smuggler/Legends|smugglers]] amongst the system's heavy freight traffic.<ref name="GG6" />
